inputSensitivity: Result is sensitive to rainfall and leaf wetness forecast divergence after 2026-05-15T00:00Z.
limitations: No accepted leaf wetness sensor observation exists for Zone B.
The forecast input is external and unpromoted.
decisionUseLimit: May prioritize scouting and evidence requests; must not be used as accepted disease presence or compliance fact.
notes: Confidence does not satisfy evidence sufficiency.
